message:
fix: hook show shorthand normalization and stale hook_bead lookup

Two fixes:
1. normalizeHookShowTarget expands rig/name shorthand to rig/polecats/name
   (or rig/crew/name) when session name roundtrip fails.
2. molecule_status.go no longer reads stale agent bead hook_bead field;
   uses authoritative query by bead status + assignee instead.

Cherry-picked from PR #2524.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
